summary: The implementation is narrow, preserves existing picked-file uploads, removes web object URL reliance for typed text, and makes native behavior explicit instead of failing silently.
accepted_changes: Introduced FileSource union for uri-based native file uploads and Blob-based web uploads.
Refactored uploadBook and uploadBookWithProgress to share FormData file and metadata append logic.
Updated Add screen file upload calls to pass uri/name/type FileSource.
Updated typed text submit to pass a text/plain Blob directly on web without object URL creation.
Added native typed-text Alert guidance before closing the modal.
Validated with Hermes-run npx tsc --noEmit and npm run build.

security_review.notes: No secrets or remote URL changes observed. Upload filename still comes from user-selected or entered title and is sent as multipart metadata to the existing backend handler.

quality_review.notes: The public mutation shape changed internally but all current call sites were updated and TypeScript compile passed.
